tasks.subject: Task 0: Set up upstream reference clone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Have a byte-exact copy of `hollow/dotfiles@c662cda` on disk so vendored files can be copied verbatim and diffed (including tracked file modes).

**Files:**
- Create: `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` (ephemeral working clone, not part of the repo)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` prints `c662cda`.

**Verify:** `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` -> `c662cda`

**Steps:**
1. `rm -rf /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git clone -q https://github.com/hollow/dotfiles /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles checkout -q c662cda`
2. Confirm HEAD is `c662cda`. No commit (scratch clone).

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/tmp/hollow-dotfiles checked out at c662cda"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor gh config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vendor upstream's `gh/config.yml` and `gh/.gitignore` byte-identical (gh reads `~/.config/gh/` directly; no `.zshrc` change).

**Files:**
- Create: `gh/config.yml` (mode 644)
- Create: `gh/.gitignore` (mode 644)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `gh/config.yml` and `gh/.gitignore` are byte-identical to upstream, tracked as mode `100644`.

**Verify:** `git add gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore) <(git ls-files -s gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore)`

**Steps:**
1. `mkdir -p gh && cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/gh/config.yml gh/config.yml && cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/gh/.gitignore gh/.gitignore`
2. `git add` then diff `git ls-files -s` vs upstream (both 100644, empty diff).
3. Commit -> "Ring 7: vendor gh config (config.yml, .gitignore)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gh/config.yml", "gh/.gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "git add gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore) <(git ls-files -s gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gh/config.yml and gh/.gitignore byte-identical to upstream, mode 100644"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Vendor missing git-* helper scripts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vendor the six missing `git-*` helper scripts byte-identical, preserving the executable bit (they run as `git <sub>` subcommands).

**Files:**
- Create (mode 755): `zsh/git-checkout-main`, `zsh/git-clone-clean-main`, `zsh/git-dmb-configure`, `zsh/git-is-dirty`, `zsh/git-merged-branches`, `zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All six scripts are byte-identical to upstream, tracked as mode `100755`.
- [ ] `zsh -n` parses each script cleanly.

**Verify:** `for f in git-checkout-main git-clone-clean-main git-dmb-configure git-is-dirty git-merged-branches git-submodules-fetch-latest; do zsh -n zsh/$f || echo PARSE FAIL $f; done && git add zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest) <(git ls-files -s zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest)`

**Steps:**
1. For each of the six: `cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/$f zsh/$f && chmod 755 zsh/$f`.
2. `zsh -n` each (PARSE OK); `git add`; diff `git ls-files -s` vs upstream (all 100755, empty).
3. Commit -> "Ring 7: vendor missing git-* helper scripts".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/git-checkout-main", "zsh/git-clone-clean-main", "zsh/git-dmb-configure", "zsh/git-is-dirty", "zsh/git-merged-branches", "zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest"], "verifyCommand": "for f in git-checkout-main git-clone-clean-main git-dmb-configure git-is-dirty git-merged-branches git-submodules-fetch-latest; do zsh -n zsh/$f || echo PARSE FAIL $f; done && git add zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest) <(git ls-files -s zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["six git-* scripts byte-identical to upstream, mode 100755", "zsh -n parses each"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Vendor gh-* helper scripts and pr
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vendor `gh-repo-list`, `gh-clone-all`, `gh-remove-archived`, and `pr` byte-identical, preserving the executable bit.

**Files:**
- Create (mode 755): `zsh/gh-repo-list`, `zsh/gh-clone-all`, `zsh/gh-remove-archived`, `zsh/pr`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All four scripts are byte-identical to upstream, tracked as mode `100755`.
- [ ] `zsh -n` parses each script cleanly.

**Verify:** `for f in gh-repo-list gh-clone-all gh-remove-archived pr; do zsh -n zsh/$f || echo PARSE FAIL $f; done && git add zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr) <(git ls-files -s zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr)`

**Steps:**
1. For each of the four: `cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/$f zsh/$f && chmod 755 zsh/$f`.
2. `zsh -n` each (PARSE OK); `git add`; diff `git ls-files -s` vs upstream (all 100755, empty).
3. Commit -> "Ring 7: vendor gh-* helper scripts and pr".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/gh-repo-list", "zsh/gh-clone-all", "zsh/gh-remove-archived", "zsh/pr"], "verifyCommand": "for f in gh-repo-list gh-clone-all gh-remove-archived pr; do zsh -n zsh/$f || echo PARSE FAIL $f; done && git add zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr) <(git ls-files -s zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/pr)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four gh-*/pr scripts byte-identical to upstream, mode 100755", "zsh -n parses each"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add parallel (brew + config + .zshrc section)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install GNU parallel via Homebrew, vendor its citation-suppress config, and add the parallel `.zshrc` section so the bulk-clone helpers run without a citation notice.

**Files:**
- Create (mode 644): `parallel/.gitignore`, `parallel/will-cite`, `parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite`
- Modify: `Brewfile` (add `brew "parallel"` between `brew "openssh"` and `brew "ripgrep"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert parallel section after the mise block's `zi auto has"mise" for jdx/mise`, before `# rsync`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] The three `parallel/*` files are byte-identical to upstream, tracked as mode `100644`.
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "parallel"` between `openssh` and `ripgrep`.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` contains the 4-line parallel section byte-identical to upstream, between the mise block and the rsync block; `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && git add parallel Brewfile zsh/.zshrc && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s parallel/.gitignore parallel/will-cite parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite) <(git ls-files -s parallel/.gitignore parallel/will-cite parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite) && diff <(grep -A3 '^# parallel: run commands' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A3 '^# parallel: run commands' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)`

**Steps:**
1. `mkdir -p parallel` and `cp` the three files (`.gitignore`, `will-cite`, `runs-without-willing-to-cite`) from `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles/parallel/`.
2. Brewfile: insert `brew "parallel"` between `brew "openssh"` and `brew "ripgrep"`.
3. zsh/.zshrc: after `zi auto has"mise" for jdx/mise` (and its blank line) insert the 4-line parallel section (PARALLEL_HOME export + mkdir).
4. Verify: PARSE OK, PARALLEL FILES IDENTICAL (mode 100644), PARALLEL BLOCK IDENTICAL, parallel between openssh/ripgrep.
5. Commit -> "Ring 7: add parallel (brew, .zshrc section, citation-suppress config)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["parallel/.gitignore", "parallel/will-cite", "parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite", "Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && git add parallel Brewfile zsh/.zshrc && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s parallel/.gitignore parallel/will-cite parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite) <(git ls-files -s parallel/.gitignore parallel/will-cite parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite) && diff <(grep -A3 '^# parallel: run commands' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A3 '^# parallel: run commands' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three parallel/* files byte-identical to upstream, mode 100644", "Brewfile has parallel between openssh and ripgrep", "parallel .zshrc section byte-identical, between mise and rsync", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Sync z-a-auto annex and vendor debug
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-sync `zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh` to upstream (adds the `mise` handler case) and vendor `zsh/debug`, which the annex requires.

**Files:**
- Modify: `zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh` (-> byte-identical to upstream)
- Create (mode 644): `zsh/debug`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh` is byte-identical to upstream (the `mise` case is present).
- [ ] `zsh/debug` is byte-identical to upstream, tracked as mode `100644`.
- [ ] `zsh -n` parses both files cleanly.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh && zsh -n zsh/debug && diff zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh && git add zsh/debug && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/debug) <(git ls-files -s zsh/debug)`

**Steps:**
1. `cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh` (overwrite -> byte-identical) and `cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/debug zsh/debug`.
2. Verify: PARSE OK both; Z-A-AUTO IDENTICAL; DEBUG IDENTICAL (mode 100644); `(mise)` case present.
3. Commit -> "Ring 7: sync z-a-auto annex (mise case) and vendor debug helper".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh", "zsh/debug"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh && zsh -n zsh/debug && diff zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh && git add zsh/debug && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s zsh/debug) <(git ls-files -s zsh/debug)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["z-a-auto.plugin.zsh byte-identical to upstream (mise case present)", "zsh/debug byte-identical, mode 100644", "zsh -n parses both"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Faithfulness + Brewfile audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole ring is a clean subset - no Brewfile deviations, valid Brewfile, valid zsh, every vendored file mode+content-identical to upstream, and the annex byte-identical.

**Files:**
- None (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all` parses and lists `parallel`.
- [ ] `comm -23` of this repo's `brew`/`cask` lines against upstream's is empty.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0, and `zsh -n` passes for every new `zsh/*` script.
- [ ] Every vendored file (`gh/*`, `parallel/*`, the eleven `zsh/*` scripts) has matching mode+hash vs upstream (`git ls-files -s`); `z-a-auto.plugin.zsh` is byte-identical.

**Verify:** the audit bash block -> ends with `AUDIT CLEAN`

**Steps:**
1. Run the audit block (brew bundle list lists parallel; comm -23 brew/cask empty; zsh -n .zshrc + each new script; git ls-files -s of all 16 vendored files matches upstream; diff z-a-auto.plugin.zsh vs upstream) -> `AUDIT CLEAN`.
2. (Optional) Manual smoke test after `brew bundle install`. No commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "set -e; brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all | grep -qx parallel; dev=$(comm -23 <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' Brewfile | sort -u) <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/Brewfile | sort -u)); [ -z \"$dev\" ]; zsh -n zsh/.zshrc; for f in debug pr gh-repo-list gh-clone-all gh-remove-archived git-checkout-main git-clone-clean-main git-dmb-configure git-is-dirty git-merged-branches git-submodules-fetch-latest; do zsh -n zsh/$f; done; FILES=\"gh/config.yml gh/.gitignore parallel/.gitignore parallel/will-cite parallel/runs-without-willing-to-cite zsh/debug zsh/pr zsh/gh-repo-list zsh/gh-clone-all zsh/gh-remove-archived zsh/git-checkout-main zsh/git-clone-clean-main zsh/git-dmb-configure zsh/git-is-dirty zsh/git-merged-branches zsh/git-submodules-fetch-latest\"; diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s $FILES) <(git ls-files -s $FILES); diff zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/z-a-auto/z-a-auto.plugin.zsh; echo AUDIT CLEAN", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile parses and lists parallel", "no brew/cask deviations vs upstream", "zsh -n passes for .zshrc and every new script", "all 16 vendored files mode+content-identical to upstream; z-a-auto byte-identical"]}
```
